product: Flexible node types are now generally available
tagline: Flexible node types allow your compute resource to fall back to alternative, compatible instance types when your specified instance type is unavailable.
what_it_does: Flexible node types allow your compute resource to fall back to alternative, compatible instance types when your specified instance type is unavailable. This behavior improves compute launch reliability by reducing capacity failures during compute launches. Classic compute resources in Databricks use flexible node types, which allows your compute resource to fall back to alternative, compatible instance types when your specified instance type is unavailable.
why_it_matters: This behavior improves compute launch reliability by reducing capacity failures during compute launches.
key_takeaway: Flexible node types allow your compute resource to fall back to alternative, compatible instance types when your specified instance type is unavailable.
